action.sure: Er du sikker på, at du vil fortsætte?

login.name: Spiller navn
login.forgot_password_description: Hvis du har glemt din adgangskode, kan du nulstille den ved hjælp af kommandoen /account i spillet.
login.tagline: Your Minecraft server, fully in your hands.
login.description: Manage players, console, files, worlds and settings from one clean dashboard. No SSH, no fiddling with config files.
login.welcome_subtitle: Sign in to your server dashboard.

master.tagline: All your Minecraft servers in one place.
master.description: Create Paper, Fabric, Vanilla or proxy servers from here. VoxelDash One downloads the server jar and a matching Java version, then starts it for you. No manual setup, no SSH.
master.setup_subtitle: This is the first run. Create the admin account for this instance.
master.welcome_subtitle: Sign in to manage your servers.

motd.title: Message of the Day
motd.subtitle: Design the message and icon shown in the multiplayer server list
motd.saved_description: Your message of the day has been applied.
motd.editor_hint: Type below. This is exactly how it appears in the server list.
motd.restart_description: This platform applies the MOTD on the next server start. Restart the server for the changes to appear.
motd.no_hex_hint: This platform does not render hex colors; they will be matched to the nearest classic color.
motd.selection_hint: Select text, then pick a color or style to apply it. With no selection, the next characters you type use the chosen style.

icon.title: Server icon
icon.description: A 64x64 image shown next to your MOTD. Larger images are scaled down automatically.
icon.updated_description: The new icon has been applied.
icon.removed_description: The custom icon has been deleted.
icon.error_description: The image could not be processed. Please try a different file.

editor.title: Edit server icon
editor.description: Draw your 64x64 server icon. Pick a colour and paint, or erase to clear pixels.

resources.subtitle: {{count}} ressourcer installeret
resources.store_coming_soon_description: Ressourcebutikken vil tillade dig at gennemse og installere ressourcer direkte fra instrumentbrættet. Denne funktion er i øjeblikket under udvikling.
resources.no_resources_description: Du har ikke nogen {{type}} installeret endnu.
resources.enabled_success: Ressource aktiveret med succes. Genstart kan være påkrævet.
resources.disabled_success: Ressource deaktiveret med succes. Genstart kan være påkrævet.
resources.delete_description: Er du sikker på, at du vil slette "{{name}}"? Denne handling kan ikke fortrydes.
resources.not_found_description: Den anmodede ressource blev ikke fundet.

config.title: Konfiguration
config.no_files_description: Denne ressource har ingen redigerbare konfigurationsfiler.

store.no_results_description: Prøv at justere din søgeforespørgsel eller filtre.
store.install_description: Vælg en version at installere. Ressourcen downloades og aktiveres automatisk.
store.no_compatible_versions: Ingen kompatible versioner fundet til din server.
store.install_success: Ressource installeret med succes. Genstart kan være påkrævet.
store.install_success_enabled: Ressource installeret og aktiveret med succes!
store.install_success_restart: Ressource installeret. Genstart påkrævet for at aktivere.
store.api_key_required_description: {{provider}} kræver en API-nøgle for at få adgang til sine ressourcer. Konfigurer din API-nøgle for at gennemse og installere ressourcer fra denne udbyder.
store.api_key_change_hint: Indtast en ny API-nøgle for at erstatte den eksisterende.

users.title: Bruger Håndtering
users.subtitle: Administrer brugere og deres tilladelser
users.create_description: Opret en ny brugerkonto med adgang til kontrolpanelet.
users.delete_description: Er du sikker på, at du vil slette brugeren"{{username}}"? Denne handling kan ikke fortrydes.
users.admin_role_description: Admins har fuld adgang til alle funktioner og kan administrere brugere.
users.no_users_description: Opret en bruger for at komme i gang.
users.no_users_permissions: Opret brugere først til at administrere deres tilladelser.

error.username_length: Brugernavn skal være mellem 3 og 32 tegn
error.password_length: Adgangskoden skal være på mindst 6 tegn

users.edit_permissions_description: Angiv hvad denne bruger kan tilgå og ændre.
users.admin_note: Bemærk: Administratorer har fuld adgang til alle funktioner uanset individuelle tilladelsesindstillinger.

players.title: Spillere
players.subtitle: Administrer online spillere, whitelist, og forbud
players.no_online_description: Spillere vises her, når de deltager i serveren.
players.no_whitelisted_description: Føj spillere til whitelisten for at give dem mulighed for at deltage.
players.kick_description: Dette vil sparke {{count}} spiller(e) ud af serveren.
players.ban_description: Dette vil permanent udelukke {{count}} spiller(e) fra serveren.
players.unban_description: Dette vil fjerne udelukkelsen af {{count}} spiller(e) og tillade dem at deltage igen.
players.deop_success: Spiller er ikke længere en operatør
players.add_whitelist_description: Indtast brugernavnet på spilleren der skal tilføjes til hvidlisten.
players.remove_whitelist_description: Dette vil fjerne {{count}} spiller(e) fra whitelisten.

all.empty_description: No player data has been recorded on this server yet.

inventory.title: {{player}}'s Inventory
inventory.editable: Editing the live inventory of this online player.
inventory.online_readonly: Live inventory is not available on this platform.
inventory.offline_readonly: Read-only view of this offline player (from saved data).

actions.offline_note: These actions are only available while the player is online.

files.file_renamed: Filen er blevet omdøbt med succes.
files.copy_description: Vælg en destination mappe og eventuelt omdøbe elementet.
files.move_description: Vælg en destination mappe og eventuelt omdøbe elementet.
files.name: Navn
files.delete_description: Denne handling kan ikke fortrydes. Dette vil permanent slette elementet.
files.no_results: Ingen filer fundet der matcher din søgning.

empty.title: Denne mappe er tom
empty.description: Upload filer eller opret en ny mappe for at komme i gang.

worlds.title: Verdener
worlds.subtitle: Administrer serververdener, vejr, tid og sværhedsgrad
worlds.create_description: Opret en ny verden med brugerdefinerede indstillinger.
worlds.none_found_hint: Verdener vises her, når serveren indlæser dem.

form.name: Verdens Navn
form.name_hint: Kun bogstaver, tal, understregninger og bindestreger tilladt.
form.seed_hint: Indtast et tal eller tekst for verdens generation.

delete.title: Slet Verden
delete.description: Er du sikker på, at du vil slette "{{name}}"? Denne handling kan ikke fortrydes, og alle verdensdata vil gå tabt.

backup.title: Sikkerhedskopier
backup.subtitle: Opret og gendan sikkerhedskopier af din server
backup.name: Backup
backup.name_hint: Leave empty to use the date. Placeholders: {date}, {time}, {datetime}, {year}, {month}, {day}, {hour}, {minute}.
backup.none_found_hint: Create a backup to get started
backup.restore_text: MCDash vil gendanne denne sikkerhedskopi under kørsel. Da Minecraft automatisk gemmer verdener fra hukommelsen med få sekunders mellemrum, kan din verden blive ødelagt. For at forhindre dette kan du stoppe serveren uden at redde verden fra hukommelsen. Eventuelle ikke-gemte ændringer foretaget på serveren under kørsel vil gå tabt. Dette gælder ikke, hvis du ønsker at gendanne logfiler eller andre filer, der ikke automatisk gemmes af Minecraft.

delete.title: Slet backup
delete.text: Er du sikker på, at du vil slette sikkerhedskopien?

access.title: Adgangskontrol
access.description: Administrer adgang til SFTP og konsol

schedules.title: Tidsplaner
schedules.subtitle: Automatisér serveropgaver med planlagte handlinger
schedules.create_description: Opsæt en ny automatisk tidsplan for din server.
schedules.none_found_hint: Opret en tidsplan for at automatisere serveropgaver
schedules.create_task_description: Tilføj en ny opgave til denne tidsplan.

delete.title: Slet Tidsplan
delete.description: Er du sikker på, at du vil slette denne tidsplan? Alle opgaver vil blive fjernet.

form.name: Skema Navn
form.minute_hint: Tidsplanen vil køre på dette minut af hver time

properties.warning: Ændring af disse indstillinger kan have en betydelig indvirkning på din server. Fortsæt med forsigtighed.
properties.updated_description: Genstart din server for at anvende ændringerne.

gameplay.label: Gameplay
gameplay.description: Game modes, PvP, and gameplay mechanics

properties.enable-jmx-monitoring: Aktiver JMX-overvågning for servermålinger og ydelsesdata
properties.level-seed: Frø til verdens generation. Lad være tom for tilfældig frø
properties.generator-settings: Brugerdefineret verden generering indstillinger i JSON format
properties.enforce-secure-profile: Tvinger sikre profiler til spillerens godkendelse
properties.motd: Besked fra dagen vist på serverlisten
properties.query.port: Port til GameSpy4 protokol server forespørgsler
properties.generate-structures: Generer landsbyer, fangehuller og andre strukturer i nye verdener
properties.max-players: Maksimalt antal spillere tilladt på serveren
properties.online-mode: Kræver spiller godkendelse med Minecraft konto
properties.allow-flight: Tillader spillere at bruge flyvning i overlevelsestilstand
properties.view-distance: Antal stykker sendt til spillere til rendering
properties.player-idle-timeout: Tid i minutter før spillerne i tomgang sparkes ud (0 for at deaktivere)
properties.force-gamemode: Tving spillere til at deltage i standard gamemode
properties.hardcore: Hvis sandt, vil spillerne blive indstillet til tilskuertilstand, hvis de dør
properties.white-list: Aktiverer en hvid liste på serveren
properties.spawn-npcs: Tillader landsbyboere og andre NPC'er at gyde
properties.use-native-transport: Brug native transport optimering hvis tilgængelig
properties.broadcast-console-to-ops: Broadcast konsol kommando output til alle online operatører
properties.pause-when-empty-seconds: Tid i sekunder før serveren sparer og stopper når ingen spillere er online
properties.broadcast-rcon-to-ops: Broadcast Remote Console (RCON) til alle online-operatører
properties.allow-nether: Tillader spillere at rejse til Nether
properties.max-chained-neighbor-updates: Maksimalt antal chunk opdateringer, der kan lænkes på én gang
properties.max-tick-time: Maksimum enkelt kryds tid i millisekunder
properties.initial-disabled-packs: Liste over ressourcepakker som er deaktiveret som standard
properties.resource-pack-sha1: SHA-1 hash of the resource pack
properties.spawn-protection: Afstand i blokke omkring spawn punkt, at ikke-ops er forhindret i at bygge
properties.require-resource-pack: Tving spillere til at bruge ressourcepakken
properties.resource-pack-prompt: Tekst sendt til klienter, når de bliver bedt om at downloade en ressourcepakke
properties.server-ip: IP- adresse som serveren skal lytte på
properties.hide-online-players: Skjuler antallet af online spillere i serverlisten

gamerules.title: Game Rules
gamerules.subtitle: Tweak the rules of the game. Changes apply to the running server.
gamerules.none_found_hint: This server did not report any game rules. You can still change them through the console.

profiling.title: Profiling
profiling.subtitle: Find out where the tick goes and which plugins or mods cause lag.

empty.title: No profile yet
empty.description: Start a session to see which plugins and mods take the most server time.

unsupported.title: Profiling not available
unsupported.description: This server doesn't support profiling. Live metrics are shown above.

noSamples.title: No samples collected
noSamples.description: The session ended before any stack samples were taken. Try a longer duration.

tree.title: Where the time goes
tree.hint: Each row is a method; expand to drill in. Click a plugin above to highlight where it spends time.

delete.title: Delete "{{name}}"?
delete.description: This permanently removes the server and all of its files. This can't be undone.

empty.title: No servers yet
empty.can_create: Create your first server. VoxelDash One downloads the software and a matching Java runtime, then starts it for you.
empty.no_access: You don't have access to any servers yet. Ask an administrator to grant you access.

forwardings.title: Forwardings
forwardings.connect_description: Link a playit.gg account to give your servers public addresses without port forwarding. One-click forwarding then appears on every server.
forwardings.waiting_approval: Waiting for you to approve the link…

empty.title: No forwardings yet
empty.description: Open the Servers page and hit "Forward" on a server to give it a public playit.gg address.

remove.title: Remove forwarding?
remove.description_prefix: Players will no longer be able to reach this server through

updates.title: Updates
updates.release_channel_description: Choose which builds servers and the dashboard update to.
updates.auto_updates_description: When on, servers and the dashboard update themselves in the background.
updates.node_updating: Updating to {{version}}. The dashboard will restart…
updates.auto_on: Automatic updates are on. VoxelDash keeps your servers and dashboard up to date on the {{channel}} channel.
updates.latest_build: Your servers and the VoxelDash One dashboard are running the latest {{channel}} build.

master_users.title: Users
master_users.create_description: New users start with no access until you grant permissions.
master_users.permissions_description: Control what this user can do across the servers.
master_users.access_all_hint: Off lets you pick specific servers.

error.username_length: Username must be at least 3 characters
error.password_length: Password must be at least 4 characters

action.admin_full: The admin always has full access

delete.title: Delete {{username}}?
delete.description: This removes the user and their access. This can't be undone.

console.empty: No console output yet. Server logs will appear here.

root.offline_hint: Start it from the server list, then open it again.
root.booting_hint: Booting up. Give it a sec...
root.file_management_hint: File management is available. Start the server for console, players and worlds.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

pwa.update_desc: Reload to get the latest VoxelDash.
pwa.install_desc: Add it to your home screen for a faster, full-screen experience.
